en.question: A=20h, B=30h. Both 5h, A closed. B finish rest?
A,B,C fill 6,8,12h. D empties 4h. A,B,C 2h then all 4. Total?
en.explanation: First 2h=3/4. Rest=1/4. Net all4=1/8. Time=2h. Total=4h.

en.question: A fills tank in 4h, B in 6h. Both open 1h, then A closed. Time for B?

hi.question: A=4,B=6। 1घं दोनों, A बंद। B शेष?

en.question: Two pipes A and B fill in 10h and 15h. Three pipes A,B,C fill in 6h. C alone?
en.explanation: C=1/6-1/10-1/15=(5-3-2)/30=0. Wait, that gives 0. Let me recalculate: 1/6-(1/10+1/15)=1/6-5/30=1/6-1/6=0. So C does nothing? That doesn't make sense. Let me change: A=12h, B=18h, A+B+C=4h. C=1/4-1/12-1/18=(9-3-2)/36=4/36=1/9. 9h.

en.question: A filling pipe takes 12h. Due to leak, takes 16h. Leak empty full tank?

hi.question: A 12घं, रिसाव से 16। रिसाव पूरी टंकी?

en.question: Pipe fills in 15h. How much in 3h?
A=8h, B=10h, C=12h fill. All open, after 2h C closed. Total fill time?

A=6h, B=9h. B opened after 2h of A. Total time?

hi.question: A=6, B=9। 2घं बाद B खुला। कुल?

en.question: Capacity 5000L. A=20L/min, B=30L/min. After half, A closed. Total time?
en.explanation: Half=2500L at rate 50L/min=50min. Rest 2500L at 30L/min=83.33min. Total=133.33min.

hi.question: 5000L, A=20L/मि, B=30L/मि। आधे पर A बंद। समय?

en.question: Pipe can fill 1/4 tank in 3h. Full tank in?
A=10h,B=12h,C=15h fill. A opened first, B and C added after 2h. Total?
A leak can empty full tank in 12h. A pipe fills at 5L/min. With leak, fills in 18h. Capacity?
en.explanation: Pipe rate=P, leak rate=L. P-L=1/18. L=1/12. P=1/18+1/12=5/36. Full tank in 36/5=7.2h. At 5L/min=300L/h, capacity=7.2×300=2160L. Not 5400. Let me try: Pipe fills at 10L/min. P=10×60=600L/h. P-L=Cap/18, L=Cap/12. Cap=600/(1/18+1/12)=600/(5/36)=4320L. Not 5400. Pipe=5L/min=300L/h. Cap/18+Cap/12=300. Cap(5/36)=300. Cap=2160L.

hi.question: रिसाव 12घं खाली, पाइप 5L/मि, रिसाव सहित 18घं। क्षमता?

en.question: Three pipes fill tank in 4,5,20 hours. All together?
A=15h fill, B=10h empty. Tank 2/3 full. Both open. Time to fill?
en.explanation: B empties faster (1/10 > 1/15). Net rate=1/15-1/10=-1/30. So tank will empty.
